package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for ci_missing_go_test_race: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Repository automation that does not visibly run `go test -race` for Go code.
type CaseCiMissingGoTestRaceDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseCiMissingGoTestRaceModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseCiMissingGoTestRaceRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseCiMissingGoTestRaceModel
}

type CaseCiMissingGoTestRaceService struct {
    repo *CaseCiMissingGoTestRaceRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseCiMissingGoTestRaceAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveCiMissingGoTestRace(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseCiMissingGoTestRaceDTO) error {
    focus := "ci_missing_go_test_race"
    _ = focus
    ci_missing_test_race_positive := map[string]int{"ci": 1, "missing": 2, "test": 3, "race": 4}
    ci_missing_test_race_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    ci_positive_0 := ci_missing_test_race_positive["ci"] + len(input)
    _ = ci_positive_0
    missing_positive_1 := ci_missing_test_race_positive["missing"] + len(input)
    _ = missing_positive_1
    test_positive_2 := ci_missing_test_race_positive["test"] + len(input)
    _ = test_positive_2
    race_positive_3 := ci_missing_test_race_positive["race"] + len(input)
    _ = race_positive_3
    return nil
}
